query:
-- Create driver user if doesn't exist
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO users (openId, name, email, loginMethod, role, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn)
VALUES ('driver-test-' || datetime('now'), 'Juan Pérez (Chofer)', 'driver.test@example.com', 'manual', 'driver', datetime('now'), datetime('now'), datetime('now'));

-- Get driver ID and assign first load
UPDATE loads 
SET assignedDriverId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'driver.test@example.com' LIMIT 1)
WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM loads LIMIT 1) AND assignedDriverId IS NULL;
